age_mark_on_listing: Able to sit unaided; up to 3 years / 15 kg
product_description_under_30_words: The IKEA ANTILOP highchair seat shell, completed with separate legs and tray, giving a simple wipe-clean seat once sitting without help is reliable.
ember_verdict: First tastes are getting close, but the chair only belongs when sitting is steady without help. ANTILOP keeps cleanup honest for porridge experiments. Budget for legs and tray as well as the shell on the same trip so you leave with a usable seat.
rank_rationale: #1: only fully verified buyable UK highchair primary on research day; overlaps band at sitting stage.
why_it_fits: Simple supportive seat for early meals.
safety_notes: Only once sitting unaided; harness on; never leave alone.
rating_source: UK parent review aggregates for ANTILOP
evidence_notes: IKEA shell+tray buyable 2026-07-24. Legs sold separately — buy as a set.
buying_factor_memo: Sitting-stage age fit first, then wipe-clean reality, then storage/fold, then longevity, then live UK buyability. ANTILOP won as verified budget path. Max one IKEA in Top 5.

age_mark_on_listing: From about 6 months to 15kg / approx 3 years
product_description_under_30_words: A Joie Mimzy Snacker highchair with a simple fold, adjustable tray and storage basket for compact homes preparing for first table meals.
ember_verdict: When ANTILOP feels too bare, Mimzy adds fold and tray storage for small kitchens. Confirm live stock on Boots before ordering because retailer pages can soft block bots. Strong compact fold candidate in UK roundups for flats and narrow dining spaces.
rank_rationale: #2: best fold feature set after verified budget ANTILOP.
evidence_notes: Boots primary; availability fetch returned buyable (soft pages possible). Founder reconfirm.
buying_factor_memo: Sitting-stage age fit first, then wipe-clean reality, then storage/fold, then longevity, then live UK buyability. ANTILOP won as verified budget path. Max one IKEA in Top 5.

age_mark_on_listing: From 6 months with Baby Set (sold separately)
product_description_under_30_words: The Stokke Tripp Trapp wooden chair that grows from highchair use with the Baby Set into a lifelong dining seat at the family table.
ember_verdict: If you want one chair for years, Tripp Trapp is the UK premium answer, with Baby Set extras in the budget. Not the first buy if weaning is weeks away and cash is tight. Confirm live Boots stock before you commit to the full set.
rank_rationale: #3: longevity champion after fold and budget paths.
buying_factor_memo: Sitting-stage age fit first, then wipe-clean reality, then storage/fold, then longevity, then live UK buyability. ANTILOP won as verified budget path. Max one IKEA in Top 5.

product_description_under_30_words: A Cosatto Noodle 0 highchair in Mister Fox print with a wipe-clean seat and compact footprint for early supported mealtimes at home.
ember_verdict: When you want more colour than ANTILOP without Tripp Trapp money, Noodle is the UK pattern pick. Confirm Boots stock live; soft bot pages appeared during research. Still a clear chair for the sitting stage once independent sitting is reliable.
rank_rationale: #4: UK brand pattern option after budget/fold/premium trio.
buying_factor_memo: Sitting-stage age fit first, then wipe-clean reality, then storage/fold, then longevity, then live UK buyability. ANTILOP won as verified budget path. Max one IKEA in Top 5.

product_description_under_30_words: A Bugaboo Giraffe high chair aimed at bringing babies up to the family table with a clean modular frame once sitting is steady.
ember_verdict: More design led and pricier; only if the look and longevity come ahead of the budget path for a table seat. Confirm Boots stock live before ordering. Ranked last because ANTILOP, Mimzy and Tripp Trapp cover most Conor needs first for early tastes.
rank_rationale: #5: design premium slot; everyday needs covered by ranks 1–3.
buying_factor_memo: Sitting-stage age fit first, then wipe-clean reality, then storage/fold, then longevity, then live UK buyability. ANTILOP won as verified budget path. Max one IKEA in Top 5.
